description: Tomorrow plan content is specific to classroom context, not generic advice

input.teacher_reflection: Ari's reading improved today with paired examples. Mika had a meltdown during the transition from reading to writing — the clear step checklist wasn't posted. Jae helped another student which was great but missed his own extension work.
input.teacher_goal: Keep Ari's momentum going. Prevent Mika's transition issues. Engage Jae without relying on him as a peer tutor.
